div.p: Documenting electronics projects, embedded systems development, IoT security experiments, and computer science research.
Electronics & Computer Science Student · Your University
I am an Electronics and Computer Science student at the Your University with a strong interest in embedded systems, PCB design, and hardware–software integration.
This blog is where I document my technical work including electronics projects, embedded system experiments, IoT security research, and computer science projects.
This platform serves as a public engineering notebook where I document projects, experiments, research ideas, and lessons learned while building real systems.
If you would like to discuss technical ideas, collaboration opportunities, or project related topics, feel free to reach out.
Electronics and Computer Science student at the Your University, documenting embedded systems projects, electronics experiments, IoT security research, and computer science development work.
Electronics & Computer Science student at the Your University. Documenting embedded systems, PCB design, IoT security, and CS projects.
